title: cynoglossum microglochin
intro: Cynoglossum microglochin, also known as the Chinese forget-me-not, is a perennial plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae) that is native to China and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cynoglossum microglochin include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of ailments.
